summary: Iteration 28: Verified massive hardpoint data audit for all 203 ships/vehicles. All 25 backend tests passed (100%) verifying curated weapon hardpoints and component overrides. Frontend UI working correctly with no regressions.

issues: React duplicate key warnings for ships with same name (Gladius Pirate, Hammerhead 2949 BIS, etc.) - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

Frontend: Login works correctly

Frontend: Loadout Builder page loads and displays ships with weapon counts

critical_code_review_comments: React duplicate key warning: Some ships have identical names causing duplicate keys in list rendering (Gladius Pirate, Hammerhead 2949 BIS, Meteor Wikelo Sneak Special, Scorpius Wikelo Sneak Special, Zeus Mk II ES Wikelo Work Special). Consider using unique ship ID instead of name for React keys.
All curated hardpoint data in _CURATED_HARDPOINTS dict is correctly applied
_COMPONENT_OVERRIDES properly overrides shield/power sizes for capital ships
seed_data_creation: Created test users hardpoint_audit28 and hardpoint_extra28 for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified the massive hardpoint data audit for all 203 ships. Key ships tested: Ares Ion/Inferno (S7), Gladiator (4 guns), Meteor (6 guns), Guardian MX (4 guns), Fury (4 guns), Shiv (6 guns), Starlancer TAC (12 guns), Starlancer MAX (8 guns), 600i BIS (4 guns), Apollo Medivac (4 guns, S2 shield), Spirit C1 (no guns), Spirit A1 (2 guns), 890 Jump (S3 capital shields), Hornet Heartseeker (4 guns), Cutter (S2 weapons), P-52 Merlin (3 guns), Vanduul Scythe (S5x2), and F8C Lightning (8 guns). All backend APIs return correct curated hardpoint data. Frontend displays correct weapon counts on ship cards.
